title: Human Rights Day nonprofit virtual meetup (and new features demo)
excerpt:

posts.author: JasHam (Jasmine Hammond)
posts.cookedHtml:
December 10 is World Human Rights Day and to celebrate the amazing work organizations are doing in this field we’re hosting an event just for you.

It will be a great chance to see how other nonprofits in the field from all around the world address common challenges. You can create your own avatar and freely walk around our specially designed virtual space and mingle with others in the community.

We’ll also provide helpful recorded content for nonprofit work on monday.com and there will be a short live session summarizing some new features on monday.com you may not know about.
